---
title: "Unit 6 - Hypotheses and Comparing Means"
---

> This unit focuses on comparing means of various groups. Traditionally this is done through the t-test and ANOVA. Here we will learn how to implement them in R and then figure out how to interpret and report!

[Code File Template](comparing_means.Rmd)

[Full Screen](slides-speaker.html)

```{=html}
<iframe class="slide-deck" src="slides-speaker.html" height="420" width="747" style="border: 1px solid #2e3846;"></iframe>
```


[Full Screen](slides2-speaker.html)

```{=html}
<iframe class="slide-deck" src="slides2-speaker.html" height="420" width="747" style="border: 1px solid #2e3846;"></iframe>
```
